---
title: "Sir Walter Scott Bt."
---

## Sir Walter Scott Bt.

**Dates:** (1771-1832)

### Description

novelist and poet

### Letters

- [To Lady Leconfield, May 23d 1899](../letters/3406_To_Lady_Leconfield.html)
- Letter from April 30th 1889
- Letter from Oct 15th [1885?]
- Letter from April 9th 1885[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872
- Letter from June 26. 1865
- Letter from [About 1865]
- Letter from Jan 21.1864
- Letter from March 21st 1860
- Letter from April 28th 1857
- Letter from [March-October 1856?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [1850]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
